top_signals.title: More War-Driven Inflation Seen in Fed’s Favored Gauge
top_signals.summary: The Federal Reserve’s favored top-line inflation gauge is rapidly approaching 4% as a war-driven spike in energy costs generates unease that price pressures will broaden.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: FBI warns of Kali365 phishing-as-a-service after April Microsoft 365 attacks
top_signals.summary: The law enforcement agency published an advisory on Thursday about Kali365 — a Telegram-based service for cybercriminals that allows them to capture legitimate "OAuth" tokens enabling widespread access to Microsoft 365 environments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
